{"query":"17th Governors Awards 2026 Honorary Oscars recipients","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1395,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"LOS ANGELES, CA – The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences announced today that its Board of Governors voted to present Academy Honorary Awards to actor Glenn Close, animator Floyd Norman and director Ridley Scott, and the Irving G. Thalberg Memorial Award to producers Christine Vachon and Pamela Koffler.Jun 10, 2026"},"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academy_of_Motion_Picture_Arts_and_Sciences","title":"Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences - Wikipedia","content":"Mayer met with actor Conrad Nagel, director Fred Niblo, and the head of the Association of Motion Picture Producers, Fred Beetson to discuss these matters.
At that meeting Douglas Fairbanks, Sr. was elected as the first president of the Academy, while Fred Niblo was the first vice-president, and their first roster, composed of 230 members, was printed.
Al Sharpton called for a boycott of the 2016 Oscars for failing to recognize minority achievements, the Board of Governors announced it would double its number of women and minority members by 2020.
Actor Will Smith announced his resignation from the Academy on April 1, 2022, five days after his onstage slap of Chris Rock, one of the ceremony's presenters, during the 94th Academy Awards.
As of June 2024, the board of governors consists of 55 governors.
Darryl Zanuck, who headed 20th Century Fox and received the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences Irving Thalberg Memorial Award, was a colonel in the Signal Corps during World War II."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Floyd_Norman","title":"Floyd Norman - Wikipedia","content":"In 2016, Norman was the recipient of the Special Achievement Award (Legendary Animator) from the African-American Film Critics Association.
In June 2018, Norman received an honorary Doctorate of Philosophy degree from Cogswell Polytechnical College.
In 2021, Norman was inducted into the Society of Illustrators Hall of Fame In 2026, he was announced as the recipient of an Academy Honorary Award.
"Film academy appoints three diverse new governors, others to leadership positions"."},{"url":"http://press.oscars.org/news/academy-honor-glenn-close-floyd-norman-ridley-scott-and-christine-vachon-pamela-koffler-2026#:~:text=LOS%20ANGELES%2C%20CA%20%E2%80%93%20The%20Academy,Christine%20Vachon%20and%20Pamela%20Koffler.","title":"THE ACADEMY TO HONOR GLENN CLOSE, FLOYD NORMAN, RIDLEY SCOTT AND CHRISTINE VACHON & PAMELA KOFFLER AT THE 2026 GOVERNORS AWARDS | Academy Press Office","content":"THE ACADEMY TO HONOR GLENN CLOSE, FLOYD NORMAN, RIDLEY SCOTT AND CHRISTINE VACHON & PAMELA KOFFLER AT THE 2026 GOVERNORS AWARDS
The Oscar® statuettes will be presented at the Academy’s 17th Governors Awards event on Sunday, November 15, 2026, at the Ray Dolby Ballroom at Ovation Hollywood, in partnership with Rolex.
Scott has received Oscar nominations for directing "Thelma & Louise," "Gladiator" and "Black Hawk Down," as well as a Best Picture nomination for "The Martian." Across a career spanning nearly six decades, he has also directed such films as "Alien," "Blade Runner," "Legend," "Black Rain," "G.I.
The 17th Governors Awards are presented in partnership with Rolex, the Exclusive Watch of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2026/06/governors-awards-glenn-close-ridley-scott-honorary-oscars-1236952824/","title":"2026 Governors Awards: Glenn Close, Ridley Scott, Floyd Norman & More","content":"Both have been selected to receive Honorary Oscars at this year’s Governors Awards in November.
Thalberg Memorial Award is presented to a creative producer whose body of work reflects a consistently high quality of motion picture production.
There will be no Jean Hersholt Humanitarian Award presented this year."},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Governors_Awards","title":"Governors Awards - Wikipedia","content":"Thalberg Memorial Award, are presented at this ceremony.
Thalberg Memorial Award: John Calley (who did not attend the ceremony; director Steven Spielberg accepted on his behalf)
The Academy held its 8th Annual Governors Awards ceremony on November 12, 2016, and presented the following awards:"}]}

Image 11: Glenn Close, Ridley Scott :max_bytes(150000):strip_icc():focal(749x0:751x2):format(webp)/glenn-close-ridley-scott-061026-8e23dd46938b4424b89529e495ee59ae.jpg). *   The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences has revealed this year's recipients of their honorees at the annual Governors Awards. *   Glenn Close, Ridley Scott and Floyd Norman will receive Academy Honorary Awards, while producers Christine Vachon and Pamela Koffler will receive the Irving G. Glenn Close and Sir Ridley Scott are among the honorees at the 17th Governors Awards, to be held on Nov. 15. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences' Board of Governors announced on Wednesday, June 10, that Close, Scott and animator Floyd Norman will receive Academy Honorary Awards. “The Academy's Board of Governors is thrilled to present this year's Governors Awards to five remarkable individuals whose groundbreaking work has forever shaped the art of filmmaking,” said Academy President Lynette Howell Taylor in a statement.","score":0.81665546,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.goldderby.com/topic/2026-governors-awards-honorary-oscars","title":"2026 Governors Awards (Honorary Oscars)","content":"Governors Awards recipients for 2026 will be determined in June. Here are a few 60+ age people who've received Oscar nominations but have never won (just","score":0.77650476,"raw_content":null},{"url":"http://press.oscars.org/news/academy-honor-glenn-close-floyd-norman-ridley-scott-and-christine-vachon-pamela-koffler-2026","title":"THE ACADEMY TO HONOR GLENN CLOSE, FLOYD ...","content":"THE ACADEMY TO HONOR GLENN CLOSE, FLOYD NORMAN, RIDLEY SCOTT AND CHRISTINE VACHON & PAMELA KOFFLER AT THE 2026 GOVERNORS AWARDS. THE ACADEMY TO","score":0.73755574,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Governors_Awards","title":"Governors Awards - Wikipedia","content":"The **Governors Awards** presentation is an annual award ceremony hosted by the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS). Three awards that honor lifetime achievement within the film industry, the Academy Honorary Award, the Jean Hersholt Humanitarian Award, and the Irving G. These three awards were formerly presented during the main Academy Awards ceremony before the Governors Awards ceremony's inception. The Governors Awards present the Academy Honorary Award (every year), Jean Hersholt Humanitarian Award (some years), and Irving G. The Academy Honorary Awards and Jean Hersholt Humanitarian Awards are both Oscar statuettes, while recipients of the Irving G. The Academy Honorary Award is given for \"extraordinary distinction in lifetime achievement, exceptional contributions to the state of motion picture arts and sciences, or for outstanding service to the Academy\". In the history of the Governors Awards, the Hersholt Award and the Thalberg Award has typically been given in separate years. The Academy held its 1st Annual Governors Awards ceremony on November 14, 2009.","score":0.6426349,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.67,"request_id":"02b6cb30-3ce0-4ece-b40c-161a775bd52c"}
